member_group_no.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือกนะจ๊ะ

root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as c_name ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_section ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.keeping_fingroup ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.academic_salary ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.remuneration_amount ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_real ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth) as date_of_birth_tdate --,SUBSTR( pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ,1 ,3 ) as age_text ,PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext(TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(sysdate ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth),0),'Y','',0) as age_text from sc_mem_m_member_work_info ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC
